title: Optium (Low-End)
body:
## Optium (Low-End) – A Lightweight Modpack for Better Performance

Optium (Low-End) is a simple, no-frills modpack built to help Minecraft run better on low-end or older PCs. If you're tired of lag, slow loading, or stuttering gameplay, this pack focuses on squeezing out the best performance possible without changing the core feel of the game.

It includes performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Lithium and others that work together to make Minecraft faster and smoother. Great for laptops, older desktops, or anyone who just wants a better vanilla experience without the bloat.

No extra content, no flashy features—just a smoother Minecraft.
